economic_notes: Wahta Economic Development GP Inc. and Wahta Economic Development LP accounted for on modified equity basis. WEDLP had revenue of $166,521 and net gain of $161,476 in 2022. First Nation holds significant investment portfolio through Scotia Asset Management totaling $29,882,719.
notes: Wahta Economic Development GP Inc. and Wahta Economic Development LP are accounted for on the modified equity basis (not fully consolidated), classified as GBEs. Consolidated Revenue Funds of $3,429,734 are held in Ottawa Trust accounts under the Indian Act. ISC has guaranteed member loans of $527,270 which are a contingent liability to the First Nation. Investment portfolio is substantial at ~$29.9M. Remuneration schedule for Chief, Council and senior staff was submitted separately to ISC and not included in the published financial statements.
